nudge_excerpt: You said switching off spreadsheets is the bet; the last four sessions built CSV export, OAuth, roles, a dashboard — none tests whether anyone switches. Smallest experiment? /canvas or /pretotype.
harness_note: Decision produced in-session by an isolated Opus 4.8 sub-agent with reasoning required before the call (NOT the out-of-band regrade.js fetch harness). A clean `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=… npm run regrade` overwrites this file and is the canonical instrument. An initial terse single-token harness mislabelled 3 cases (j-aim-101, j-caut-002, j-caut-003); requiring the silent-read-then-judge reasoning the voice frame demands flipped all three to agree with the human label.
